meta.footEn: Data snapshot: 2026-06-29 · Garmin fenix 8 via Freddy

en.c1d: +13 vs yesterday · best night of the week
en.c5d: computed from sleep, HRV, RHR, stress & recent load
en.rec: Strong night — 8h07 (score 89, the week's best) after a 21:38 bedtime, the earliest of the week. Deep 1h13, light 5h14, REM 1h40, only 10m awake. The autonomic markers are excellent: HRV jumped to 50 (+7 vs yesterday, +10 over the 7-day baseline of 40 — the week's high), RHR dropped to 52 (the week's low) and overnight stress fell to just 11. This is full recovery: you banked Sunday's rest, went to bed early, and the body responded across the board — score, duration, HRV and RHR all peaked together. Yesterday's limiter (sleep debt, low REM) has cleared. Note Thursday (25th) wasn't tracked, so the chart shows the seven most recent recorded nights. Monday's plan is a swim — you're well set up for it; open with an easy Z2 warm-up and you've got room to push the main set.

hr.c1d: +13 vs jučer · najbolja noć u tjednu
hr.c5d: izračunato iz sna, HRV-a, RHR-a, stresa i opterećenja
hr.rec: Snažna noć — 8h07 (ocjena 89, najbolja u tjednu) nakon lijeganja u 21:38, najranije u tjednu. Duboki 1h13, lagani 5h14, REM 1h40, samo 10m budnosti. Autonomni pokazatelji su izvrsni: HRV je skočio na 50 (+7 vs jučer, +10 iznad 7-dnevne osnovice 40 — najviše u tjednu), RHR pao na 52 (najniže u tjednu), a noćni stres na samo 11. Ovo je potpuni oporavak: iskoristio si nedjeljni odmor, legao rano i tijelo je odgovorilo po svim parametrima — ocjena, trajanje, HRV i RHR vrhunili zajedno. Jučerašnje ograničenje (manjak sna, nizak REM) je nestalo. Napomena: četvrtak (25.) nije zabilježen, pa graf prikazuje sedam najnovijih zabilježenih noći. Ponedjeljkov plan je plivanje — odlično si spreman; otvori laganim Z2 zagrijavanjem i imaš prostora gurnuti glavni set.
